name: Lemon Pie-Filling Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 1-quart airtight container.
3. Label the container as "Lemon Pie-filling Mix."
4. Store the mixture in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 4 1/4 cups of mix.
